meaning: vt.浣胯嚧鍔涗簬,浣垮幓,浣跨敤
examples: While I stared at her, speechless, she explained that as the local inn would close at midnight and I had better betake myself thither without further delay.
The rascals, perhaps, may betake them to robbing.
Oh! How she would have liked to betake herself to Paris!
